resources.string: When your Alta guest pass rotates, paste the new link here. Android Auto uses the same saved pass. The pass is stored only on this device — export it to keep a backup.
Guest pass link or short code
Could not save. Paste the full Alta link or short code.
No guest pass saved. Paste or share your Alta link above.
Guest pass expired. Open Garage Unlock on your phone to update it.
Expires %1$s · %2$d days left — share a new link soon
Pass expired — paste a new link to keep unlocking
Expiry unknown — tap “Set expiry date” to get reminders
Heads up: this pass is already expired.
This deletes the pass from this device. Export it first if you might need it on another device.
Your guest pass expires in %1$d days. Share a new Alta link to keep unlocking.
Warns before your Alta guest pass expires
